rationale: Both correctly diagnose the None+1 TypeError from missing extended ratio tokens on the Base tokenizer and both give the maintainer-confirmed workaround (hunyuan_image3_dit.yaml) plus the correct disposition (close, track hardening in a follow-up issue per Gaohan123). X goes deeper with a concrete, well-reasoned guard/fix diff and explains why the moe.yaml topology triggers AR init, without introducing unsupported claims. Y is well-structured but injects an unverified 'requires 4 devices (GPU/NPU) for tensor parallelism' precondition and an extra ar.yaml config entry that aren't grounded in the issue or thread, weakening its grounding and risking confusing the reporter (whose collect_env shows a CPU-only environment).
